steps.t: Tafikh is waiting to ask you her first question.
Question One: Belondor, Kinsman of the Fleet-fast, is married to an Umbari woman named Khâsha.
Tafikh is waiting to ask you her second question.
Question Two: Azagath Sea-shadow has been known to walk through the markets of Umbar Baharbêl.
Tafikh is waiting to ask you her third question.
Question Three: The Church of the All-Seeing prized the sea-opal Abâshal, and used it to decorate its places of worship.
Tafikh is waiting to ask you her fourth question.
Question Four: The Sea-stone Mutiny, during which the Heirs of Castamir were overthrown, began in the Upper Ward of the city.
Tafikh is waiting to ask you her fifth question.
Question Five: The name of this land comes from the word Umbru-mâra, which means 'Fruitful Land.'
Tafikh is amazed that you answered all of her questions correctly.
